details: The v1 policy required provider content SHA-256, but the failure path persisted only the provider envelope SHA-256 after strict-parser rejection. Raw content was correctly not stored, but the exact rejected message content hash is unavailable after process exit.
scientific_effect: The cardinality rejection and response-received status remain auditable, but exact rejected content cannot be independently reconstructed or compared.
required_for_any_v2: Compute and append provider_content_sha256 immediately after content extraction and before JSON/schema normalization.
